Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Programmatic activation of first-party and marketplace data across destination partners and connected platforms in the LiveRamp network. Manages distribution managers, integration connections, segment configurations, destinations, and OAuth connections. Authenticated with OAuth 2.0 access tokens issued via the service account token URI.

Contact Support:
 Name: LiveRamp Developer Portal
